ValidationRule.description: Must choose Company Credit Card if Payment Type = Company Credit Card.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
RecordType.DeveloperName ="Receipt", ISPICKVAL( PaymentType__c ,"CompanyCreditCard"), ISBLANK( CreditCardResponsibleCompany__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose the company credit card used for this expense. (EC008)
